title: Author a multi-message LiveView without crashing on unknown
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/events_router_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.EventsRouterLive). The LiveView subscribes (when connected) to "events:org:1" and handles three message types: {:event_created, event}, {:event_updated, event}, and {:event_deleted, id}. Each updates a stream :events via stream_insert or stream_delete. A final handle_info(_, socket) clause must catch everything else without crashing.
tier_rationale: Multi-message routing with catch-all. Composition of event handling + streams.
